name: @sirpm/colors
description: Verified-recompose of colors@1.4.0 — zero-dependency core, behavior-locked to a held-out oracle. Ships its contract (SIR spec + oracle); verify or rebuild locally with the sirpm CLI.
provenance: see sir.manifest.json — derived from colors@1.4.0 (github.com/Marak/colors.js), the last release before the Jan-2022 maintainer sabotage
